Game.Name: Jikkyou World Soccer 2 - Fighting Eleven (Japan) (Beta)
Game.plot: It's a whole new ball game... Realistic sprites with 36 teams featuring recognisable celebrity players. Increased CPU intelligence to challenge beginners and experts alike. Choose from 16 formations, 8 strategies, 20 players and 9 adjustable player skills. Four way play possible with adaptor.Cheat: All Star TeamAt the title screen press R, Up, Down, L, X, B, Left, A, Right, Y, if you did it correctly you will hear a dog's bark. Note: You have to use the 2nd controller (1st doesn't work at all for this code)Cheat: Play last game vs World All Stars in International CupPlay last game vs World All Stars in International CupCheat: Extra skill pointsEnter edit players mode before the match and use all available skill points. Highlight the "Cancel" option and press Y for 200 additional skill points.
